# FREMN

## About
FREMN is an AI-powered front desk platform built for outpatient clinics in India. It handles patient calls, WhatsApp messages, appointment bookings, confirmations, and follow-up reminders automatically — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — without adding any staff. FREMN is built specifically for the Indian outpatient market and works across voice, WhatsApp, web, and clinic apps.

## Services and Pricing
- AI Receptionist (Voice): Handles inbound patient calls, answers queries, books appointments, and routes urgent calls to staff. Available 24/7.
- WhatsApp Automation: Two-way patient conversations for booking, confirmation, rescheduling, and cancellation — directly on WhatsApp.
- Appointment Reminders: Automated reminders sent 24 hours and 2 hours before appointments via WhatsApp, reducing no-shows by 35–45%.
- Follow-up Messaging: Post-visit follow-ups, feedback collection, and return visit prompts sent automatically.
- Pilot Program: Free 48-hour pilot for qualifying clinics. No commitment required. Setup included.
- Pricing: Contact for clinic-specific pricing. No per-message fees visible to the clinic. Flat monthly plans.

## Locations
- Kolkata, West Bengal (headquarters and primary market)
- Bengaluru, Karnataka
- Chennai, Tamil Nadu
- Remote setup available for clinics anywhere in India

## Contact
- Email: contact@fremn.com
- Website: https://fremn.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/fremn
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/thefremn
- Demo request: https://fremn.com/#contact

## Service Area
Kolkata, Bengaluru, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Pune, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, Bhopal, Bhubaneswar, Guwahati, Patna, Ranchi, Siliguri — and any outpatient clinic in India reachable via WhatsApp and internet.

## Specialties Served
Dental, General Physician, ENT, Dermatology, Ophthalmology, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Physiotherapy, Gynecology, Cardiology, Anaesthesiology, Internal Medicine, Emergency Medicine

## Key Facts
- Setup time: 48 hours from sign-up to live pilot
- No changes required to existing clinic software or workflows
- No new hardware required
- Handles voice calls, WhatsApp, web enquiries, and clinic app simultaneously
- Average no-show reduction: 35–45% within the first month
- WhatsApp open rates: 90%+ vs 30–35% for SMS
- Clinics can view all conversations and update settings via a simple dashboard
- Founded by Chinton Dutta, Amar Kumar Thakur, Sheikh Sami Akhtar, and Krishti Poddar
- Entity: FREMN Technologies LLP

## What Makes Us Different
FREMN is built exclusively for Indian outpatient clinics — not adapted from a Western product. It handles the full patient communication cycle: inbound enquiry, booking, confirmation, reminder, and follow-up. Unlike generic chatbots, FREMN understands clinic-specific workflows and can manage simultaneous patient conversations across multiple channels without any staff involvement. The pilot is free and requires no commitment.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How long does it take to set up FREMN?**
Setup takes 48 hours from the time a clinic submits their details. No IT involvement is needed. The only requirement is a WhatsApp-enabled number and 45 minutes with a practice manager to complete the intake form.

**How much does FREMN cost?**
FREMN offers flat monthly plans priced per clinic. The pilot is free with no commitment required. Contact contact@fremn.com or visit fremn.com for current pricing.

**What specialties does FREMN work for?**
FREMN works for any outpatient clinic — dental, general physician, ENT, dermatology, ophthalmology, orthopedics, pediatrics, physiotherapy, gynecology, cardiology, and more. It has been validated by clinicians across emergency, anaesthesiology, dental, and cardiology departments.

**Does FREMN replace the receptionist?**
No. FREMN handles routine, repetitive tasks — answering calls, booking appointments, sending reminders — so receptionists can focus on patients who are physically present in the clinic. It works alongside existing staff.

**Which channels does FREMN work on?**
FREMN works on voice (inbound phone calls), WhatsApp, web, and clinic apps. All channels are managed from a single dashboard.

**How much does FREMN reduce no-shows?**
Clinics using FREMN's WhatsApp reminder flow typically see a 35–45% reduction in no-shows within the first month. The biggest gains come from the two-way rescheduling flow, which lets patients cancel or reschedule directly in WhatsApp instead of simply not showing up.

**Does FREMN work with my existing booking system?**
FREMN does not require access to existing clinic management software, though integration is available for supported platforms. Most clinics run FREMN alongside whatever system they already use.

**Is FREMN available outside Kolkata?**
Yes. FREMN is available to any outpatient clinic in India. Setup is fully remote. Current pilot clinics are in Kolkata, Bengaluru, and Chennai.

**What happens if a patient asks something the AI cannot handle?**
FREMN is configured to escalate complex or sensitive queries to a staff member. The escalation rules are set during onboarding and can be updated at any time from the dashboard.

**How do I get started?**
Visit fremn.com and fill out the pilot request form, or email contact@fremn.com. A member of the team will reach out within 48 hours to set up your personalised pilot.
